ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event (e.g., Invoicing - Swim Coaching, Payment - Swim Coaching) */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account involved in the transaction */,
  "debit_amount" REAL /* Debit amount of the transaction */,
  "credit_amount" REAL /* Credit amount of the transaction */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the transaction (e.g., 2023.01) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated invoice (if applicable) */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated payment (if applicable) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the transaction */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was last updated */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Invoice, Payment, Credit Note, Refund) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account (e.g., Billed Account Receivables, Cash) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., Asset, Liability, Equity, Revenue, Expense) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer to whom the invoice is issued */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was issued */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., Open, Paid, Overdue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the invoice */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the invoice */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the invoice */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was last updated */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., Net 30, Net 15) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the invoice */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount including tax */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was received */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the payment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the payment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was last updated */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated invoice */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the payment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "invoice_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product or service included in the invoice */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product or service */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product or service */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the item (quantity * unit price) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the invoice item */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the invoice item */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice item was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice item was last updated */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the invoice item */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the invoice item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product or service */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product or service */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product or service (e.g., Coaching, Merchandise) */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product or service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product or service */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the product */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the product */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate for the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Financial Officer, Manager, Admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date the password was last changed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Modify) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access log */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
